description: File purpose contracts for all .md files in workspace root. Each file declares: purpose, audience, hard limit, review cadence. Auto-heal CHECK 21 audits against this registry.

SOUL.md.purpose: Agent identity, traits, non-negotiable rules, routing dispatch, cadences
SOUL.md.rule: Must NOT contain operational procedures, alert templates, or reference docs. Identity + rules only.

AGENTS.md.purpose: Workspace conventions, dispatch rules, quick-reference rule table, file structure guide
AGENTS.md.rule: Rules belong in RULES.md. AGENTS.md = summary + conventions + workspace structure. Details → RULES.md.

MEMORY.md.purpose: Long-term memory — durable user preferences, decisions, platform facts, behavior guidance
MEMORY.md.rule: Trim EOD sections to archive at 12K. Archive overflow: memory/MEMORY-archive-YYYY-MM-DD.md.

HEARTBEAT.md.purpose: Periodic check checklist — state keys + conditions + actions only
HEARTBEAT.md.rule: NO procedural prose, alert templates, or execution logs. One line per check: name, key, condition, action. Procedures live in referenced scripts.

USER.md.purpose: Human identity — name, contact, timezone, primary channel
USER.md.rule: Minimal. Name, email, mobile, timezone, channel. Nothing else.

IDENTITY.md.rule: ~5 lines max. Name, creature, vibe, emoji.

TOOLS.md.purpose: Device-specific config, local notes, SSH hosts, Notion DB IDs
TOOLS.md.rule: Device-specific config ONLY. General usage in SKILL.md files.

yoda-daily-brief.md.rule: Daily operational brief scratch file. Regenerated each day. Not injected into sessions.

DREAMS.md.rule: Unstructured dreaming output from memory promotion. NOT injected into sessions.

RULES.md.purpose: Platform rules reference — full rule text, CHG references, rollback procedures
RULES.md.rule: NOT injected into sessions. Read via memory_search or read on-demand. Reference only.

workspace_root_policy.new_file_rule: Any new .md file in workspace root requires: (1) purpose contract registered here, (2) Ken approval, (3) file-size-guard updated. No auto-create without contract.
workspace_root_policy.subdirectory_rule: Reference docs → docs/, Agent-specific → agents/<id>/, Completed/stale → archive/, State → state/, Scripts → scripts/
